string.text:
%c[0,153,255,255]Artifacts%c[0,140,140,140] - an object of an incompletely understood physical nature formed in anomalies.
 
%c[0,0,255,30]Note:%c[0,140,140,140] 
One thing is certain: the farther north you go, the greater the chance of finding rarer and more expensive artifacts.
 
%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]The first thing that makes them interesting is that they influence the bearer in different ways: the influence can be both beneficial and harmful. The sale of artefacts is theoretically the main source of income for stalkers, most of whom came to the Zone for this very reason. Scientists working in various fields, such as medicine, are very interested in studying the properties of artefacts.
 
Artefacts generate anomalies from various organic and inorganic substances within reach: grass, sand, pieces of flesh, metal, etc. Different types of anomalies produce different artefacts and their properties can be both similar and strikingly different. The appearance of artefacts can be very different: they can glow, bounce, be transparent, have coloured halos or have none of these properties and just lie on the ground. The shape is also rarely the same, but the size usually varies between 10-30 centimetres in diameter. Some artefacts take a long time to form and are sometimes found in a half-formed state. There are artefacts that, for one reason or another, have an unknown parental anomaly.
 
There is no consensus among scientists as to how exactly artefacts are formed. Empirical observations show that artefacts are formed from the remains of living creatures and plants, as well as inorganic materials that have fallen into the anomaly. These and other remains are subjected to all sorts of influences that create the artefact. It is still not clear whether they are a kind of ‘waste’ of anomalies or, on the contrary, ‘fruits’. Stalker legends support the version that artefacts are the remains of creatures trapped in the anomaly.
 
Each artefact has an effect on the wearer when equipped on the belt, and the rarer the artefact, the more expensive it is and the stronger its properties. Usually it is a combination of negative and positive properties, but there are also artefacts that do no harm.
 
%c[0,0,255,30]Identification:%c[0,140,140,140] 
Artefacts are divided into four ranks. The higher the rank, the more rare and expensive the artefacts are. Detectors are also classified according to the same principle.
 
%c[0,200,0,255]• %c[0,140,140,140]Ordinary: Rank 1
%c[0,200,0,255]• %c[0,140,140,140]Rare: Rank 2
%c[0,200,0,255]• %c[0,140,140,140]Very rare: Rank 3
%c[0,200,0,255]• %c[0,140,140,140]Unique: Rank 4

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]A compound of several hollow organic formations, this artefact emits a gaseous substance that can neutralize chemical or toxic particles inside the body without harming it. Apart from that Bubble, however, possesses numerous negative properties. For example, it greatly amplifies the effects of psy-waves as well as fields produced by mutants and anomalies. This disadvantage is not to be taken lightly: some stalkers have reported that psy influence was so potent when in possession of a Bubble that they felt their heads cracking from the inside and the only thing they could do was scream in pain and run as far as they could. The same mechanism seems to be at work in case of electro anomalies: the artefact will conduct electricity and increase amps of electric current. Moreover, many reports by stalkers indicate that Bubble needs a power source to be functional. This power source is the body itself: the artefact drains vitality and willpower from the user, often on such a scale that it induces dizziness and in extreme cases causes the user to faint. The only other positive aspect to this artefact is the fact that it speeds up healing process and closes up wounds, however it is so potent in this regard that its high price on the market and the demand for it are perfectly justified. Radiation output is highest on the artefact radiation scale. WARNING: Because of its organic nature and instability this artefact is well known to spontaneously combust more so than any other organic artefact and for this reason it is advised to abstain from wearing it in the vicinity of a fire or acid anomaly.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]Soul is a unique organic artefact with properties just as unique - it secretes slimy goo that dramatically increases recovery rate of wounds. Thanks to its reasonable price and attractive appearance, this artefact is a valuable collector's item. Because of its organic nature, Soul is highly flammable and should not be carried near a campfire or most heat sources. It is known to spontaneously combust when exposed to temperature exceeding 60°C. The artefact provides a high level of toxic and chemical protection by absorbing chemical agents. It then uses them as basis for producing its gooey substance which, when applied to wounds, soothes the pain and speeds up healing process. On the other hand, Soul amplifies the effects of psy-waves and increases the damage of electricity to one's body. It is also known to drain power from its user. The artefact does not have high density and thus is not very heavy. Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact has soft, porous, skin-like texture and is said to be able to compress. It resembles and acts like a sponge in this regard, but reveals its special PROPERTIES only when exposed to certain external conditions. Firstly, when in the closest proximity of heat source it emits odor of burning flesh. Prolonged exposure may enhance its flammability and cause it to ignite. While this phenomenon leaves the artefact undamaged, it can cause objects in its vicinity to heat up and in extreme cases to ignite along with the artefact. For this reason, it is safe to conclude that it absorbs heat and is able to convey it to other objects. Secondly, to carry the sponge metaphor further, the pores on its surface are known to absorb small amounts of toxicity from environment. Thirdly, the artefact slightly amplifies the damaging effects of psy-fields to living organisms by absorbing psy energy and emitting it at a small rate. Fourthly, Meat Chunk is also known to be a conductor of electricity much like the skin of a living creature. Certain sources within stalker community indicate further that it makes one feel physically drained when used for even short periods of time. Fifthly, probably the most beneficial feature of this artefact is its ability to slowly close up wounds and heal damaged tissues. Radiation output is lowest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]Firefly interacts with fields unknown to science, considerably speeding up regeneration of tissue and organs in living beings, as well as normalizing metabolic processes. This artefact can literally get a badly wounded stalker back on his feet in a matter of minutes. On the other hand, Firefly can spontaneously combust when exposed to potent heat sources. It also amplifies the harmful effects of both psy-fields and electro anomalies, and seems to drain stamina and decrease stamina recovery. However, it will absorb any and all deadly chemicals within one's body. Furthermore, it admirably protects against toxicity, and seems to inject neutralizing chemical agents into user's bloodstream, which negate the effects of toxins and nerve damage. For this reason, it is in high demand in military circles as it can make terrorist attacks with chemical or biological weapons more easily manageable. Unfortunately, Firefly is extremely rare. Radiation output is very high on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A light spherical artefact with a skeletal structure. Absorbs radiation and accelerates tissue regeneration and blood clotting. Due to the absence of negative properties, "Zelenka" is quite valuable.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]A reddish formation of compressed fossilized plants, soil and animal debris. Can partially neutralize chemical poisons by absorbing them and reducing overall toxicity level in user's bloodstream. Quite widespread and not very effective as it makes chemical burns fester. It will catch fire when exposed to open flame or even spontaneously combust. Another downside to this artefact is that it will increase the negative effects of psy-waves and is a potent conductor. It also drains energy from user's body. Stone blood will, however, speed up wound recovery due to its organic nature. Radiation output is lowest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A hollow spherical formation resembling transparent parchment. It has a faint emerald inner glow. Popular among stalkers for its ability to neutralize even the most harmful chemicals to humans.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]An artefact-root. It greatly accelerates the regeneration of tissues and organs in living creatures. However, if used incorrectly, the positive effects can be nullified due to its strong radiation background.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A melted piece of tree resin with a greenish tint. Due to various anomalous influences and emissions, it acquired powerful radio-absorbing properties. Its uniqueness lies not so much in being a "black hole" for radionuclides, but in its ability to greatly accelerate the half-life of any isotopes. Simply put, it's a real radiation disposer.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]An interesting spherical artefact containing a large amount of unknown substance with properties that can have beneficial effects on the body. According to scientists' observations, it is absolutely safe, making it attractive to both stalkers and customers outside the Zone.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]An anomalous formation, it is a plasma substance in a transparent pulsating shell. It creates a unique healing, curative, and radioprotective effect on the human body. Due to its high cost, it is a target for stalkers.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]It is a small diameter hoop with four streamlined triangular parts. These parts have two pairs of opposite charges that randomly change their location within the structure. The properties of this artefact can be characterized as protective. It has two oppositely charged poles, which interact to create spatial heterogeneity. The relative hardness of such a "dome" is ensured by compounds that absorb the energy of all external anomalous influences. Extremely radioactive.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]The artefact has rather strange properties. On one hand, it inexplicably accelerates tissue regeneration, but on the other hand, it prevents blood clotting in open wounds. There have been known cases of death among stalkers due to hemophilia caused by its effects, giving the artefact a rather bad reputation, especially among novices. However, experienced stalkers quickly realized that the negative effects could be compensated by other artefacts with blood-stopping properties or timely use of necessary medications.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive and toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]It is known for certain that the artefact was created by the "Fruit punch" anomaly. When worn on the belt, wounds bleed less, although the owner's body becomes vulnerable to various burns.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Formed by the "Fruit punch" anomaly. The negative properties of this artefact are compensated by its ability to increase blood clotting. Such an artefact is rare and fetches a good price.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]The "Fruit punch" anomaly can create such an artefact under the rarest, extreme set of physical conditions. As a result, a semi-transparent solid object is formed. The artefact is expensive and rare.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact releases spores that embed themselves in the owner's body. The spores feed on the stalker's blood, slightly weakening the body. Nevertheless, this is a peculiar form of symbiosis - the artefact consistently removes radionuclides from the body and also increases resistance to harmful chemicals. The long-term effects of such exposure remain unclear.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact offers slightly more psy-protection than its cousin, Moonlight. It comprises electrostatic elements, but scientists have yet to determine the exact physical conditions required for its formation. The artefact is quite popular in the Zone and is valued by its residents and visitors alike for its energizing properties, although it has an adverse effect on the body when used for prolonged periods of time. One should take note, however, that this artefact hinders blood clotting and increases bleeding rate of open wounds. On the other hand, being a powerful resistor, it is well known for its ability to shield its user from lethal doses of electricity. This artefact is also extremely light and very portable. Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]Shell is composed of two disk of bluish color connected by semitransparent material of unknown nature. This strange artefact was considered devoid of any useful properties by many scientists for a long time. Only recently has it been discovered that it is indeed quite beneficial. It provides a high level of psy protection and absorbs electromagnetic interference, acting as a grounding material. When the artefact comes into contact with the body, it will make one feel rejuvenated and thus it increases stamina recovery. This effect has in case of some stalkers induced hyperactivity. One downside of this artefact, however, is that it reduces the number of platelets in blood, thus increasing bleeding rate. Shell is extremely light and very portable. Radiation output is very high on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact is very similar in appearance to Moonlight and resembles a plasma globe or a plasma lamp. When worn, it is known to slightly counter harmful effects of psy-anomalies or psy-waves of certain mutants. Flash acts as a powerful resistor and will absorb even lethal doses of electricity. On the other hand, it is extremely important to note that each time it comes into contact with electricity, it will release a static build-up which, while not deadly, can have an effect similar to a Taser shock. The artefact has weak regenerative properties and its direct touch has similar effect to a plasma globe, making one feel energized. However, it also hinders healing process, thus caution is advised especially when wounded or bleeding. This artefact is also extremely light and very portable. Radiation output is lowest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This unique electrostatic artefact can resonate under the influence of psy-waves. Stalkers have learned to fine-tune the artefact so that it resonates in opposite phase to the main source of emissions, thus significantly neutralizing their effects. This orb of considerable beauty also increases electrical protection by reducing conductivity in the body when exposed to high levels of electricity. It also enhances energy and stamina recovery, allowing its user to feel energetic and refreshed. An unwanted side effect is that it decreases healing rate and coagulation. This artefact is also extremely light and very portable. Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact has the appearance of translucent spider webs. Just as proteinaceous spider silk, it is sticky and has properties of glue. It can be found most commonly in or near electro anomalies and it seems to have absorbed their certain PROPERTIES: it is able to smooth fluctuations in electric field density and acts as a weak resistor, protecting the wearer from electricity and reducing its damaging effects. When worn, the artefact is also known to slightly counter the harmful effects of psy-anomalies or psy-waves of some mutants. Because of its electrical nature, it provides the body with additional albeit weak source of energy. It does not possess any beneficial healing properties, as the gluey fluid produced by the artefact is damaging to living tissue and will prevent blood clotting. It is extremely light. Radiation output is lowest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact generates weak electric currents that have a stimulating effect on the muscular system, thus reducing the threshold of fatigue.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]There is no exact data on the conditions under which this spherical artefact is formed, which is why it got its name. However, practice shows that it is most often found in places of high electrical activity. It has the property of neutralizing the negative effects of psi-radiation, even with very prolonged exposure to humans.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]An artefact that, as a result of an energy collapse, lost almost all of its properties. It is of some interest to science as it emits light and electromagnetic energy.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact oddly combines properties characteristic of products of gravitational and electrical anomalies, although it is known to be generated exclusively in electrical anomalies.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A rare artefact. It improves overall health as well as cellular and tissue metabolism. Its primary PROPERTIES make it a double-action metabolic corrector, promoting rapid body recovery. By stimulating the metabolism of various chemical groups, it accelerates muscle mass growth.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Compared to many other artefacts, "Electron" has no useful properties. On the contrary, its transportation is quite difficult due to its abnormally large mass. However, this quality and difficulty in detection make the artefact particularly valuable. Scientific laboratories pay good money for such samples.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A beautiful glass-like formation of electrostatic anomalies. Behind its attractive appearance lies significant danger: the artefact can cause considerable harm to health, although it has excellent blood-stopping properties.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A bright (literally) representative of the electrostatic artefact family. It releases a gaseous substance that has a beneficial effect on the body. Due to its high efficiency, it is in great demand.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]One of the few artefacts in the Zone that effectively handles all kinds of physical impacts on its owner.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Rumor has it that these particles are used by Monolithians to charge their eponymous weapons. The artefact was found recently by a stalker nicknamed Loon. The artefact contains a charge of energy. Many minds are puzzled by the mystery of this item.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Valued by buyers from the "Big Land." A good means to replenish capital.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]This tear shaped artefact is а highly compressed lump of ice and snow and unthinkably formed in thermal-based anomalies. It increases resistance to radiation.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A small-looking artefact, harmless, slightly accelerates wound healing.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]This unusual flower grows in some electrical anomalies. Several stalkers have been lucky enough to find this artefact. Highly valuable, but emits radiation.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Essentially pure silicon dioxide, considering only the atomic mass of the substance. Nevertheless, it differs from natural crystal not only by its saturated copper sulfate hue but also by its mechanical properties. Formed in clusters of "Electra" anomalies, this quartz fragment has a complex system of internal currents, while externally exhibiting dielectric properties.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]Also colloquially known as "Radioactive Snowflake". At first glance, this artefact resembles a white Kolobok. Some claim that it actually is a form of Kolobok as it greatly increases resistance to electric currents by creating its own electric field and absorbing electricity that passes through user's body. Thanks to its unique properties, the artefact can significantly increase the bearer's muscle tone, thus greatly improving stamina recovery. Due to its high radioactivity, stalkers in possession of it are sometimes jokingly referred to as "Radioactive Snowflakes". When faced with the decision whether to carry it on the belt during a mission, you have to carefully weigh its pros and cons: does it pay to have greater endurance and high protection against electricity at the cost of being constantly exposed to its deadly radiation? Even if you are determined to take it with you, it should be noted that it is not to be used on long excursions to the Zone. Its usefulness in a fight is also debatable as it increases bleeding rate and prevents wounds from closing due to its very sharp appendages which sting the user and irritate the skin. It is, however, as light as a snowflake and very easy to carry around. Radiation output is highest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,66,170,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] electric
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact is formed in anomalous zones with intense thermal activity. Actively consumes excessive heat and remains cool at all times. It will also protect the user against acids found in toxic and chemical anomalies. On the other hand, exposure to such environments makes the artefact increase the corrosivity of acids due to unknown as of now mechanism. For this reason, one is forced to weigh pros and cons of Crystal when in the vicinity of areas of high toxicity. It also acts as a conductor of electricity. Another positive effect possessed by this artefact is that it accelerates clotting if worn close to the body. (Side note: it is not recommended to keep this artefact in your possession for longer periods of time as blood clots can be hazardous to your health.) This artefact is also highly sought for by jewelers outside the Zone as its inner core is not radioactive and considered to be of exceptional beauty if polished and refined. Only the first 1 cm of its outer layer emits radiation. It is, however, highly advised to proceed with caution when planning to bring the artefact to the market as prolonged exposure to even minimal amounts of radioactive materials can result in death of the user. Covered with very hard layer. Relatively heavy due to high density. Radiation output is lowest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]Shaped like a DNA helix, Mama's Beads are created in the Burner anomaly. One of their most characteristic features is that they constantly pulsate, generating emissions beneficial to the human body. These emissions increase the metabolism of any living creature, accelerating coagulation and healing of wounds. The mechanism behind the effects of this artefact is still unknown. Mama's Beads also possess potent protective qualities: they are able to shield the body and objects from extreme heat and acids. On the other hand, it should be noted that the presence of this artefact increases the corrosivity of acids, leading to accelerated deterioration of equipment and higher damage to tissues of any living organism. It is thus strongly advised to proceed with caution in acidic as well as in toxic environments when in possession of Mama's Beads. Another dangerous effect of this artefact is the fact that it will increase electrical conductivity, so the probability of electrocution while wearing this artefact is much higher, especially during storms and in the vicinity of electrical anomalies. The weight is also quite high for such a small artefact, which leads to a conclusion that is of extremely high density. Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact, which resembles the human eye, considerably increases metabolism of the body, helping wounds heal quicker. Experienced stalkers say that Eye also brings luck. Irrespective of the validity of that statement, its positive effects are indeed quite potent. First of all, it reduces temperature of user's body and cools all objects in its vicinity. Secondly, it provides substantial protection against all types of acids by gradually increasing their pH to the level of water (pH of 7). Thirdly, this artefact soothes the pain and is extremely useful when treating wounds. These beneficial qualities, however, come at a price. This artefact is extremely dangerous when exposed to chemical anomalies as it amplifies their toxicity and increases their potency. It is hence highly recommended to keep the artefact in your backpack, never on the body, when exploring toxic areas unless you have a death wish. The artefact is also known colloquially as "copper eye" as it conducts electricity and amplifies its dangerous effects in the same way as copper does. Radiation output is very high on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact forms in areas of high thermal activity. Produces powerful infrared emissions which intensify metabolic processes, healing wounds before its bearer's very eyes. As this artefact is very rare, it is extremely valuable. As regards its effects, it is similar to the Eye in that it will reduce the temperature of user's body, which is especially useful when exposed to potent heat sources. It also acts as powerful resistor, and negates the effect of acids. Moreover, its healing capabilities are even stronger than in case of the Eye as stalkers in possession of this artefact are said to have survived being wounded by chimeras. Thanks to that, it has earned the reputation of a miraculous artefact. Many stalkers owe it their lives, and most veteran mutant hunters carry it in case they run into danger. However, it shares not only positive but also negative properties of its cousin: entering a toxic or chemical anomaly with this artefact on the belt is suicide. It will increase the corrosivity of chemical particles and enhance the adverse effect of the toxins within user's bloodstream. It can also be used as a reusable medkit of sorts since it heals wounds very quickly. Radiation output is highest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]It is a spherical artefact made of red-colored crystal, created in the Burner anomaly. It has an unique property - it has a constant temperature of 75 degrees Fahrenheit/24 degrees Celsius, regardless of its surroundings. This allows it to absorb heat from its vicinity and to create a little pocket around the user which prevents the flames from damaging the body. Stability of temperature is the cause of another of its positive effects: it accelerates healing rate and stops bleeding. It will also protect the user from chemical burns. However, it is unrecommended to approach chemical and acid anomalies when in possession of the artefact as it will increase the adverse effects of acids and toxins in user's bloodstream. It also makes the user vulnerable to electrical currents. It is quite heavy due to high density of crystal-like material. Radiation output is lowest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A necessary condition for the generation of this artefact is exposure to and close proximity to a thermal anomaly. Its ability to lower temperature in a small radius makes it a good thermal protection element.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Has pronounced healing properties. Exerts a beneficial effect on the entire body. The mechanism of its impact on the body is unknown. The absence of harmful emissions and the difficulty of detection make this artefact especially valuable.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A powerful muscle tissue repair agent. In combination with the stabilizing effect on the respiratory system, it enhances RNA biosynthesis, functional and enzymatic cellular elements, including cellular membranes, and also stimulates DNA replication and cell division. The source of this effect is not fully understood.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Significantly reduces the weight of a backpack and also has good restorative properties. Due to its extreme rarity and high effectiveness, it is in great demand.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Formed by the "Burner" anomaly at high temperatures. Externally, it looks like a blackened droplet-shaped formation with a glossy surface, covered with cracks.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]A relatively rare artefact forming in chemical areas, Kolobok is highly valued for its ability to heal most kinds of wounds and stop bleeding in a matter of minutes. For unknown reasons, scientists are spreading rumors among stalkers that the artefact modifies bearer's genetic code, which is unproven and should be regarded as conscious attempt at monopolizing the supply of the artefact by the scientific community. This does not, however, mean that it is completely harmless. One drawback of this artefact is the fact that it will increase electrical conductivity, so it is best to avoid electro anomalies when in possession of the artefact, especially since its negative effects are not balanced with positive ones. It will also reduce energy recovery, which is the result of its sharp needle-like appendages. The needles cause small and quickly healing wounds which bring constant pain and itch, thus reducing stamina. This artefact also weakens protection against psy-emissions produced by anomalies or mutants as well as from heat and acids due to its high flammability. Given its chemical origin, it is also well known for its ability to increase user's protection against toxicity. Lightweight and not too much of a burden to carry around. Radiation output is very high on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,0,128,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] chemical
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]Direct successor to and a superior version of Gravi artefact. As was the case with Gravi, it was scientist Sakharov at Yantar who discovered its unique properties after a massive blowout/emission hit the Zone. Thanks to meticulous research that followed, it was established that this new artefact is produced when three Gravi artefacts interact and get sucked into one another's singularity fields. This phenomenon is extremely rare, due to which the artefact is highly valued. It is rumored within Ukrainian Spetsnaz circles that in the Zone there are agents from the Ministry of Defense of the Russian Federation whose sole objective is acquiring and transporting Goldfish to specialized laboratories located outside of the Zone. The artefact creates a constant gravitational singularity field which affects only its closest vicinity. However, some stalkers have been known to disappear for no apparent reason leaving only a Goldfish behind. The artefact provides exceptional thermal and acid protection. Furthermore, it also forms a protective and almost greasy film around its user which has qualities of strong fire retardant and also protects the user against acid by breaking down elements comprising acids into simpler substances. It is extremely heavy and it is not recommended to use it on long excursions into the Zone, especially for extended periods of time. Radiation output is highest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact is usually generated by gravitational anomalies. Protects against psi attacks.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact looks like a pacifier. Well valued for its properties.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact is so rare that many researchers do not even realize that such a substance can exist in natural conditions. Repels caustic chemical components.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]Gravi is formed from metallic substances exposed to prolonged gravitation. This makes it capable of sustaining a gravitational field, which causes it to have various properties, among others increasing weight of all objects in its close proximity. For a long time, the artefact was a mystery, and it was scientist Sakharov at Yantar who first discovered that Gravi creates a minute singularity field of gravitational nature, the phenomenon which occurs in intervals of 30 minutes. This artefact may yield beneficial results in medicine or warfare if the mechanism behind its functioning is harnessed for the purposes of science. Suffice it to say, its positive properties completely outweigh its negative aspects. Namely, it increases weight of objects as a result of gravitational field and emits lethal doses of radiation. On the other hand, it will protect the user from harmful effects of fire anomalies found throughout the Zone and from acids of chemical/toxic anomalies. However, instead of absorbing deadly chemicals and toxins, Gravi causes chemical compounds to be broken down to simpler substances thanks to its singularity field. As noted above, it is extremely heavy and it is not recommended to use it on long excursions into the Zone, especially for extended periods of time. Radiation output is very high on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact resembles melted cheese interspersed with sapphire-like stones. Only yellow outer shell of the artefact appears to give off radiation and by careful processing it is possible to extract the non-radioactive blue parts for jewelery and other industrial purposes. This is due to the fact that if cleaned properly and polished, sapphire comparison becomes much more explicit: the stones are as hard and durable as this beautiful gem. This quality of theirs and their appearance make them perfect gemstones and jewelers all over the world strive to have them in stock. The usefulness of the artefact, however, is not limited to its industrial applications. There is scientific evidence suggesting that sapphire-like stones effectively protect from toxicity, whereas the outer shell slightly increases resistance to heat. Due to its density the weight of artefact has increased beyond normal standards, and thus it is one of the heaviest anomalous creations in the Zone. Radiation output is lowest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This bizarrely-shaped artefact appears in places with increased gravitational activity. Acting as a kind of sponge that absorbs chemical and toxic elements, this artefact provides protection from external toxic agents as well as from chemical particles that have already made their way into the body. Although it appears almost organic, it is actually more similar to coral. Due to its non-organic nature, it is nonflammable. It provides protection against acids as well as heat. There is no particular faction that takes great interest in it, so it is mostly sold to scientists who study and experiment on the artefact in order to find the use for it. It has high density and is thus extremely heavy. Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This gravitational artefact attracts and absorbs toxic/chemical particles, reducing the effects of toxic poisoning on the body. Very common in the Zone and unofficially used outside the Zone for treating people who have been exposed to hazardous or deadly chemical and toxic agents. This artefact is quite heavy as the gravitational field seems to increase mass. It will slightly protect its user against extreme heat and acids produced respectively by fire and chemical anomalies. Radiation output is lowest on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This glowing artefact can generate a locally directed gravity field which increases its mass. For this reason, Night Star is extremely heavy. It provides protection against acids as well as heat. Due to its beautiful inner core it is highly sought after by jewelers all over the world, however it is best to proceed with caution as unskilled treatment can cause the artefact to explode with power sufficient to level a small building. It is thus highly advised to perform the polishing by means of specialized machinery, which minimizes the probability of explosion. Moreover, only the outer core of the artefact emits radiation. Night Star will also absorb toxic and chemical agents from the environment, which makes it a valuable artefact for artefact hunters, although the amount of toxicity absorbed is negligible. It is, however, relatively cheap and even stalkers with pretty tight budgets can afford it if opportunity to buy it arises. Radiation output is low on the artefact radiation scale.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A gravitational formation. Significantly reduces the weight of the carried load, which is valued by stalkers.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]The artefact generates a local gravitational field, which significantly reduces the impact of gravitational force. Quite rare, but still found in areas of anomalous gravitational activity.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Despite the absence of any apparent gravitational effects, the "Fountain" prevents the movement of objects in a small area around it. According to one scientific theory, this is due to an unknown field generated by the artefact. Interestingly, the artefact's effect is more noticeable the faster an object moves through its area; this property has led stalkers to use it as a protective element.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive and toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Externally resembles a fossilized formation. Has similar but more pronounced properties than the "Fountain" artefact, which makes it of particular interest to scientists.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive and toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Stalkers also call this artefact the "Amulet." Its properties lie in the ability to create a powerful, yet unexplored field in a small radius, which reduces the kinetic energy of any moving objects entering its area of effect.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive and toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Produced by gravitational anomalies. While not possessing particularly valuable properties, its lack of harmful effects on the body makes it attractive to many stalkers.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Anomalous formation, similar in magnetic properties to super-dense metals. However, it has a relatively low specific mass. Creates a fairly powerful gravitational field. Considered rare due to its detection difficulty. Surprisingly, the artefact is completely non-radioactive.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A very rare formation of symbiosis between gravitational and thermal anomalies. Presumably, a fusion of the "Sandstone" and "Gravi" artefacts. Despite a number of useful PROPERTIES, it is important to remember that the "Sun" is an extremely radioactive artefact.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,0,60,60] • %c[0,140,140,140] hybrid
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]It's hard to say why this artefact received such a name: because of its appearance or due to its excellent healing properties. But what is most surprising is that the "Heart" has absolutely atypical properties for products of gravitational anomalies, once again indicating that humans are still far from understanding the mechanisms at work in the Zone.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A typical product of gravitational anomalies with typical properties. Does not protect against induced radiation but reduces already received doses quite well.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]An anomalous formation of rare beauty. Resembles a model of a planet with four satellites arranged on a central symmetry orbit. In addition to its unusual appearance, it also has a number of valuable PROPERTIES. Extremely radioactive.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A superdense clump of substance. When exposed to a radioactive environment, it can release a cloud of colorless gas with quite strong neutralizing properties. However, careless wearing of this artifact can lead to severe health consequences and even death.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]It looks like two mushroom caps that look absolutely identical, possibly why it got its name.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]The artifact is formed under prolonged gravitational impact on metal-containing substances. It has the property of neutralizing the negative effects of psi-radiation.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]A very rare and expensive artifact in the zone. It looks like a crystal but with a greenish color. A barely noticeable green film forms around its owner. No, it's not a disease. This will add more space to your backpack. Only a few people have found this artifact.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,225,225,225] • %c[0,140,140,140] gravitational
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]This artifact can only be found in radioactive anomalies deep in the Zone. Provides protection against thermal and chemical burns. The downside is it's radioactive.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] thermal
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]A rare artefact - it's been several years since one was found. The artefact can locate gaps in anomaly fields. It is believed that it can help one traverse the most complex anomaly fields completely unharmed or teleportation to anywhere. However, very few know how to handle it properly.
 
It was previously in the possession of the legendary Forester, but now there is unconfirmed information about its possible current location: somewhere in the western part of the CEZ, closer to the northern locations.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,84,0,153] • %c[0,140,140,140] unique
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information
%c[0,140,140,140]This artefact was found at the center of the legendary Oasis. It appears that the Heart is a crystallized plant, which has acquired the healing properties of the Oasis.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,84,0,153] • %c[0,140,140,140] unique
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]The most mystical and unstudied artefact-device. Its main value lies in its teleportation properties, which make it easy and simple to teleport anywhere. Rumor has it that such an artefact belonged to the legendary Guide.
 
Many stalkers have tried to find it mostly somewhere on the surface, but without success, which means it makes sense to look in the "underground" places of the CEZ.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,84,0,153] • %c[0,140,140,140] unique
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]The artefact significantly increases the overall tissue regeneration rate of the body after any type of injury. It generates a powerful gravitational field around itself, which locally reduces the effect of gravity. Highly radioactive. The origin of the artefact is shrouded in mystery.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,84,0,153] • %c[0,140,140,140] unique
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]The origin of the artifact is not fully known. It heals wounds well. No harmful effects of the substance on the human body have been identified.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,84,0,153] • %c[0,140,140,140] unique
%c[0,100,100,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] harmless

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Truly, an amazing thing. The "Black Stone" protects the owner from many troubles, but it slowly kills them in return. Some stalkers suspect that the artefact is a shard of the Monolith.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 4 
%c[0,84,0,153] • %c[0,140,140,140] unique
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive and toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]According to some researcher-theorists, this artefact is a hybrid of "Battery" and "Dummy".
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,0,60,60] • %c[0,140,140,140] hybrid
%c[0,255,69,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] radioactive

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Result of interaction between the "Rusty Hair" anomaly and the body of an inattentive stalker. This spiky artefact pierces the owner's body, no matter how it is attached. However, it helps cleanse the body of radionuclides. Quite common and inexpensive.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 1 
%c[0,0,77,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] vegetable
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]Crystalizes in the "Rusty Hair" anomaly. Removes radiation from the body naturally. That is, through the ears along with a certain amount of blood. Blood loss is also possible through other openings. It's rare to find and quite effective, earning a stable price on the artefact market.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 2 
%c[0,0,77,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] vegetable
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic

%c[0,0,255,30]Information:
%c[0,140,140,140]The "Rusty Hair" anomaly very rarely produces such an artefact. It raises blood pressure, and the body gets rid of a lot of red blood cells. Along with them, accumulated radiation leaves the body. Sakharov noted in his fundamental work "Ionization and Polarization of Rare Artifact Components" that the composition of this formation possesses critical stability, and creating such an artefact in laboratory conditions within the next few decades is unrealistic.
 
%c[0,200,200,200]PROPERTIES:%c[0,140,140,140]
 
%c[0,1,255,255] • %c[0,140,140,140] rank 3 
%c[0,0,77,0] • %c[0,140,140,140] vegetable
%c[0,245,119,10] • %c[0,140,140,140] toxic
